svg.text: ESP8266 RGB LED Strip Controller — 24V Circuit Diagram
BTN 1–6: internal pull-up, wire pin → GND
BTN 7 (GPIO16): external 10kΩ to 3.3V required (no internal pull-up)
Any LM2596 module; adjust trimmer to 3.3V before connecting
Connect OUT+ to ESP8266 3.3V pin — do NOT use 5V
N-ch logic-level, 55V 47A TO-220 — fully on at 3.3V gate
Add heatsink if strip draws >3A per channel
Limits inrush / suppresses ringing on gate wire
Holds gate LOW during ESP8266 boot — prevents flicker
Wire external 10kΩ from GPIO16 to 3.3V; button to GND
24V PSU −ve, buck GND, ESP8266 GND, all MOSFET sources
